name: Josera Sensicat 2kg
shortDescription: SensiCat is well-balanced formula with high-quality ingredients ensures high digestibility. Ideal for adult cats and cats with a sensitive digestive system.
description: Composition: poultry protein (dried); maize; rice; greaves; poultry fat; sugar beet pulp; poultry protein (hydrolysed), maize protein; poultry liver (dried), minerals. Product Details: SensiCat is well-balanced formula with high-quality ingredients ensures high digestibility. Ideal for adult cats and cats with a sensitive digestive system. Highly accepted formula and easily digestible ingredients Encourages a pH-value of 6.0-6.5 to reduce the risk of urinary stone formation Dietary fibre reduces hairball formation Also suitable for kittens from 6 months on that prefer a larger kibble size.  Nutritional Analysis Nutrient Value Protein ~33% Fat ~12% Crude Fiber ~2.5% Crude Ash ~7% Moisture ~10% Why Choose JOSERA SensiCat? Gentle on Digestion – carefully selected ingredients ensure high digestibility, making it ideal for cats with sensitive stomachs. Reduces Hairball Formation – dietary fibers help prevent hairballs by supporting healthy digestion. Urinary Health Support – promotes a healthy pH value (6.0–6.5) to lower the risk of urinary stones. Highly Palatable – loved by even the fussiest eaters, with a texture and flavor cats adore. Suitable for Young Cats – perfect for kittens 6 months and older who prefer larger kibble.
